ocr_findings.description: Diagram arrow labels within 雇用契約 and 労働者派遣契約 illustration images (e.g., '雇用＋指示', '指示', '雇用', box labels '会社', '派遣元', '派遣先', '労働者') are not captured — contained within img-N.jpeg placeholders. These are supplementary diagram annotations; main explanatory text is present in body.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 3種類の契約 table (雇用契約/労働者派遣契約/請負契約) and ユーザーとベンダー callout plus diagram explanations for each contract type. The 3-row table is correctly rendered. Body text for all three contract types matches image. Minor loss of diagram annotation labels inside image placeholders, rated low.
